scripts.dev: concurrently -n agg,ui,bm,ticks,deploy -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow "pnpm --filter @trading/aggregator dev" "pnpm --filter @trading/cockpit dev" "python3 addons/bookmap/addon.py" "pnpm --filter @trading/tick-store dev" "bash ~/auto_deploy_tick_addon.sh"
scripts.pm2:restart: pnpm run build:cockpit && pm2 restart aggregator
